title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 242.440 - Cost of organization, how paid
text:
242.440.  Cost of organization, how paid. — Nothing in sections 242.010 to 242.690 shall authorize or be construed to authorize any uniform tax or any tax of any kind to pay any expenses mentioned or referred to in section 242.430, in addition to or in excess of the uniform tax of one dollar per acre upon each acre of land within such districts mentioned in said section 242.430.
(L. 1943 p. 519 § 12362A, A.L. 1959 H.B. 314)
